![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600ppfrenew-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

PPF RENEW

## Exterior / maintenance

### Innovative PPF cleaner and renewer.

Q²M PPF Renew is a dedicated maintenance product designed to clean, refresh and protect paint protection film. It combines light abrasives with protective additives to remove haze and oxidation while restoring a smooth and glossy finish.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mppfrenew_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Innovational PPF cleaner and renewer.

The formula cleans deeply into the porous structure of PPF, removing bonded contamination that dulls the surface over time. Light abrasive particles restore clarity and gloss without damaging the film, including modern self healing PPF. The silica infused composition enhances slickness, improves UV resistance and adds chemical protection, while leaving a clean surface ready for further protection if required.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons37.svg)

LOW DUST 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons46.svg)

NO SILICONES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons42.svg)

NO FILLERS 

what makes

Q2M PPF RENEW so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/96259978_2672726186290836_541141221888753664_o.jpeg)

Restores gloss and smoothness to contaminated PPF

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/69043198_2451269558436501_768994717319823360_o.jpeg)

Removes haze and oxidation safely

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mppfrenew.webp)

CAPACITIES 

120 ML / 1000 ML

Gloss 

Consumption

60ml/ car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

PPF RENEW

01
Wash and dry the surface thoroughly. 

02
Apply a small amount of product to an applicator or polishing pad. 

03
Work the surface by hand or machine using light pressure. 

04
Wipe residue away with a clean microfibre towel. 

05
Repeat if needed on heavily affected areas. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is Q²M PPF Renew designed for? 

Cleaning, refreshing and protecting paint protection film.

02
Can it be used on self healing PPF? 

Yes, it is safe for all modern PPF, including self healing films.

03
Does it contain fillers or silicones? 

No, it contains no fillers and no silicones.

04
Can it be applied by machine? 

Yes, it can be applied by hand or machine.

05
What does it leave behind after use? 

A smooth, glossy finish with added UV and chemical protection.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000254398-Q-M-PPF-Renew)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
